note: Upgrade price ladder raised to 1 / 2.5 / 6 / 15 SUI (L0->1..L3->4), a real climb to the Oracle. Fees still pool in the Treasury and are claimable; setupAgents sweeps after each upgrade so the peak balance needed is the largest single step. The tier model behind each level is hidden in the UI. Avow package (0x4f3e...a3ee) reused unchanged.

supersedes.reason: Repriced the tier upgrade ladder to 1/2.5/6/15 SUI.
